---
name: Skill request
about: Request a new skill or integration
labels: skill-request
---

## What should the skill do?

Describe the skill — what it fetches, processes, or delivers.

## Data source / API

What data source or API would it use? Is there a free tier?

## Use case

How would you use this in a workflow?

## Willing to implement?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this myself (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] No, just requesting
